decision: Reject promotion and health inference. A passed command establishes only local validation of supplied bounded metadata; separate authority and current target-owned Vercel readback remain mandatory.
evidenceRequired: Mode-0600 bounded snapshot fixture and integrity-checked detail artifact.
Separate exact authority receipt and authenticated target readback before any deployment claim.
limitations: The command does not read Vercel, aliases, deployments, variables, logs, or traffic.
nonClaims: A local preflight is not mutation authority, Production proof, or health.
rollbackRevocation: Correct or discard the local snapshot; the Vercel runbook owns any separately approved external rollback.
